title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 is a major release adding a native desktop app for macOS, Linux, and Windows, remote gateway support for server connections, an improved web dashboard with admin controls, fuzzy model search, and enhanced security features. The release focuses on multi-surface accessibility and ease of use for local and remote agent workflows.
